---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
#Load the dataset
kpi = pd.read_excel("C:\\Collin\\Minor project\\01 Projects\\Supplier Synthetic\\Supplier_KPI.xlsx")
esg = pd.read_excel("C:\\Collin\\Minor project\\01 Projects\\Supplier Synthetic\\Supplier_ESG.xlsx")
```

```{python}
#Merge Dataset
df = pd.merge(kpi, esg, how='inner', on='Supplier_ID')
```

```{python}
#Check for missing values and data type
df.dtypes
```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```
